heading: Overview of
MBA in Digital Marketing and E-Commerce

overViewImage.alt: MBA in Digital Marketing and E-Commerce – Program Overview

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Shape Your Digital Future With a Modern E-Commerce & Marketing MBA
overViewOfOnline.description: The MBA in Digital Marketing and E-Commerce at Teksversity equips learners with essential digital skills for online business growth. Students develop expertise in SEO, paid ads, social media strategy, analytics, consumer behaviour, and e-commerce operations. The curriculum blends marketing fundamentals with hands-on simulations, campaign planning, digital tools, and performance-based training. Designed for working professionals, this program supports flexible upskilling while preparing learners for roles in digital strategy, online retail management, performance marketing, and e-commerce operations across global markets.
keyPoints: Understand SEO, SEM, analytics, and social strategy
Use digital tools for campaigns and online sales
Strengthen analytical and consumer insight skills
Apply ethical, accurate digital marketing practices
Develop leadership for digital and e-com roles

heading: Why Choose MBA in Digital Marketing & E-Commerce
in Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity offers a practice-driven MBA aligned with real digital and e-commerce requirements. Students work on campaigns, digital tools, analytics dashboards, and marketing simulations that reflect real business environments, enabling strong job readiness.

description.firstDescription: Expert mentors guide students through ad strategies, analytics tools, online consumer behaviour, and e-commerce operations. The curriculum emphasizes applying digital concepts to real marketing challenges and online business planning.

description.secondDescription: A flexible online model supports professionals seeking structured digital upskilling. With resume building, interview practice, and placement support, learners confidently transition into digital marketing, performance strategy, online retail management, and e-commerce-focused job roles.

keyPoints: Case studies on digital strategy and campaigns
Projects on ads, analytics, and online stores
Workshops on SEO, SEM, and automation tools
Leadership training in digital communication
Sessions led by digital and e-commerce experts
One-on-one mentorship from digital trainers
24/7 access to learning materials

Personalized guidance for progress

Resume building for marketing careers

Career mapping for targeted job paths
Professional readiness and leadership
Webinars with top digital and e-com leaders

Global networking in virtual sessions

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

faq.question: What is an MBA in Digital Marketing and E-Commerce?
faq.answer: It is a postgraduate program that trains students in digital marketing strategies, online business models, e-commerce operations, analytics, and digital branding.

faq.question: What skills will I gain from this MBA?
faq.answer: You will learn SEO, SEM, social media marketing, content marketing, email campaigns, Google Analytics, e-commerce tools, digital branding, and online sales optimization.

faq.question: What career opportunities are available after this course?
faq.answer: Graduates can work as Digital Marketing Manager, SEO Specialist, Performance Marketer, E-Commerce Manager, Content Strategist, Social Media Lead, or Growth Marketer.

faq.question: Who should choose this specialization?
faq.answer: Students interested in online business, marketing, analytics, branding, social media, and digital startups will benefit from this program.

faq.question: How does this course prepare me for the industry?
faq.answer: Through live projects, digital campaigns, analytics assignments, and exposure to real-world e-commerce platforms and marketing tools.

faq.question: Is this program suitable for entrepreneurs?
faq.answer: Yes, It teaches branding, digital customer acquisition, online store management, and performance tracking essential for launching and scaling online businesses.

faq.question: Do I need a technical background for this MBA?
faq.answer: No. Basic computer knowledge is helpful, but the program teaches the tools and marketing techniques from scratch.

faq.question: What subjects are covered in the curriculum?
faq.answer: Digital marketing, social media strategy, e-commerce operations, consumer behavior, web analytics, automation tools, campaign management, and digital business models.

faq.question: Which companies hire graduates of this specialization?
faq.answer: E-commerce companies, digital marketing agencies, tech startups, retail brands, consulting firms, and online marketplaces.

faq.question: What is the future scope of digital marketing and e-commerce?
faq.answer: Very high, as businesses increasingly shift to online platforms, driving demand for skilled digital marketing and e-commerce professionals worldwide.
